name: Tax-Free Withdrawal of Distilled Spirits

eligibility.description: Available to entities using spirits for exportation, chemical manufacturing, scientific research in universities/laboratories, medical use in hospitals/clinics, or R&D by plant proprietors.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows for the withdrawal of distilled spirits from bonded premises without payment of excise tax for specific industrial, scientific, educational, or medical purposes.
